name: Bot Hook | Site Survey
description: Sends SMS and email updates about the Site Survey phase for residential projects in CO or CA, triggers a webhook, and notifies the project manager.

Hello, this is Olivia - Virtual Assistant with Photon Brothers. You're moving into the Site Survey phase of your project. The visit takes about an hour, and we'll be taking a few photos of your property and home which will allow us to create an engineered design. Yourself or a decision-maker will need to be home, and we respectfully ask that pets are secured.

If you did not schedule a Site Survey time with your Sales Consultant, they will be reaching out shortly to do so. Thanks! 

Reply END to stop texts.

Hello, this is Olivia - Virtual Assistant with Photon Brothers.

Thank you for choosing Photon Brothers for your solar energy project. We’re excited to partner with you for your installation!

Our process includes five key phases, and you’re now moving into the first step: the Site Survey.


What to Expect for Your Site Survey:

Scheduling: A member of our team will reach out shortly to coordinate your appointment.

Duration: About 1 hour.

Do I need to be home? Yes—a decision-maker must be present.

Need to leave during the visit? That’s totally fine—we can begin inside and finish outside, or the other way around.

Can someone else be home instead of me? Absolutely, as long as they’re of legal age and can make decisions regarding your project if needed.


Access Needed:

Outside: Main electrical panels

Inside (if applicable): Garage, basement, attic (for sub-panels)

Water shutoff valve: We’ll take a quick photo to confirm proper grounding

Gate codes: If applicable, please share any necessary access information


Additional Notes:

Pets: Please secure any pets for everyone’s safety.

Storage near panels: Clear any items blocking electrical panels so our technician can access and photograph them.


What the Technician Will Do:

Take photos of your electrical panels (inside and out, if needed)

Capture drone images if required for system design

Document siding for battery mounting options (if your project includes a battery)


We’ll keep you updated at every stage of your project but if you have any questions, please just reply to this email - we’re here to help.

If you did not schedule a Site Survey time with your Sales Consultant, they will be reaching out shortly to do so.

Best,
Photon Brothers
